com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs

Class AbstractNativeArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray<W>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractPrimitiveArray, PStructArray

    public abstract class AbstractNativeArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.AutoCloseable
    The base of all native arrays: one aligned allocation, cached base address, and lifecycle.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long byteSize() 
      void clear()
      Zeroes every element.
      abstract void clearRange(long fromIndex, long toIndex)
      Zeroes fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive.
      void close()
      Releases the backing native memory.
      boolean isEmpty() 
      boolean isOpen() 
      long length() 
      abstract W writer() 
      W writer(long position)
      Creates a writer at position.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • length

        public final long length()
        Returns:
        the element count

      • byteSize

        public final long byteSize()
        Returns:
        the allocation payload size in bytes

      • isOpen

        public final boolean isOpen()
        Returns:
        true until closed

      • isEmpty

        public final boolean isEmpty()
        Returns:
        true if length is zero

      • clear

        public final void clear()
        Zeroes every element.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clearRange

        public abstract void clearRange(long fromIndex,
                                long toIndex)
        Zeroes fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive.
        Parameters:
        fromIndex - the range start, inclusive
        toIndex - the range end, exclusive
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • writer

        public abstract W writer()
        Returns:
        a fresh writer at position zero

      • writer

        public final W writer(long position)
        Creates a writer at position.
        Parameters:
        position - the starting position
        Returns:
        the writer
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range

      • close

        public final void close()
        Releases the backing native memory. Safe to call more than once.
        Specified by:
        close in interface java.lang.AutoCloseable
